rulings.Case Title: MICKEY H DAVIS VS. JEFFREY WINNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Two Years [Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 583.420(A)(1)]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 24, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT JEFFREY WINNER, STEPHANIE WINNER, ERIN WINNER's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Two Years [Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 583.420(A)(1)] DENIED. The explanations provided by Plaintiffs attorneys are not so unreasonable or non-credible as to not pass the test for discretionary dismissal. See Putnam v. Clague (1992) 3 Cal.App.4th 542. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA HEWLETT VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant, For Order To Furnish Security, And For Pre-Filing Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 24, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY's Motion To Declare Plaintiff A Vexatious Litigant, For Order To Furnish Security, And For Pre-Filing Order continued to May 22, 2017. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to this motion no later than April 7, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copy of reply. = (501/REQ)
